M-079.NAME: premium-email-templates
M-079.owns: Premium Matrix/cyberpunk Resend verification and password-reset email templates.
M-079.purpose: Bring transactional email visual quality in line with the premium KrotPN frontend without weakening token safety.

exports.template-premium-verification: Email verification HTML/text templates with logo, action button, security copy, and spam-safe structure.
exports.template-premium-reset: Password reset HTML/text templates with one-time token semantics and clear safety copy.
exports.rule-email-fallback: Readable text fallback without image URLs, raw tokens, or visual-only meaning.

constraints.constraint-1: Verification/reset tokens, provider keys, and full one-time URLs must never leak to logs or provider error details.
constraints.constraint-2: Email must remain usable when remote images are blocked by the mailbox client.
constraints.constraint-3: Template changes do not modify Resend deploy configuration or provider semantics.

acceptance-metrics.metric-1: Backend email tests pass for verification and reset templates.
acceptance-metrics.metric-2: Phase-64 smoke proves logo URL, text fallback, token redaction, and dark-email compatibility markers.

M-079.hotspot: H-066: Premium Resend templates must remain token-safe, text-fallback clean, and compatible with image-blocking email clients.
